checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify MFA enforcement on critical user accounts
checklist_items.description: Check if Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is required for user accounts with access to sensitive data or administrative functions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User authentication relies solely on weak passwords.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Automated test report confirming MFA requirement or configuration setting.

checklist_items.title: Confirm strong password policy is active and enforced
checklist_items.description: Check that the system enforces strong password policies (minimum length, complexity, no common passwords) during registration and password changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User authentication relies solely on weak passwords.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of password policy configuration or result of manual test attempting weak passwords.

checklist_items.title: Test login endpoint rate limiting
checklist_items.description: Verify that the login endpoint implements effective rate limiting to prevent brute-force password guessing attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no rate limiting on login attempts.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting on login attempts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Automated test report demonstrating login attempts being blocked after exceeding the rate limit.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires users submitting RFRVs (Request for Real-World Asset Valuation) to link and use their on-chain identity (e.g., wallet address) as a form of strong authentication.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO) for RFRV submitters.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing the requirement and mechanism for on-chain identity linkage during or prior to RFRV submission.

checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.
